member.name: T:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.IPlatformModule
member.summary: Every NICKSCAN ERP module implements this interface in its API project's Program.cs as a static module descriptor. The unified ERP portal reads this to populate the App Launcher tile grid and to verify the module satisfies the platform contract version it ships against.

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.IPlatformModule.DisplayName
member.summary: Human-readable name shown in the App Launcher (e.g. "NickScan Central Imaging").

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.IPlatformModule.Description
member.summary: One-line description shown on the App Launcher tile.

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.IPlatformModule.PlatformContractVersion
member.summary: The platform contract version this module targets (see PLATFORM.md).

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.IPlatformModule.Icon
member.summary: Material icon name or asset path for the App Launcher tile.

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.IPlatformModule.Color
member.summary: Brand color for the tile (CSS hex string).

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.IPlatformModule.HomeRoute
member.summary: Default landing route after the user clicks the tile.

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.IPlatformModule.PlatformDependencies
member.summary: Platform service dependencies this module requires. The portal warns if a tenant has the module enabled but is missing one of these. Use lower-case names: "comms", "files", "audit", "notify", "workflow", "tenancy", "identity", "jobs", "reporting".

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.IPlatformModule.Capabilities
member.summary: Capability tokens advertised by this module (used for cross-module integrations and feature gating). Free-form, dot-separated. e.g. "container.scan", "payroll.run", "invoice.post".

member.name: T:NickERP.Platform.Core.Contracts.ModuleManifest
member.summary: JSON-serializable manifest returned by every module's GET /api/_module/manifest endpoint. The unified ERP portal fetches this to render the App Launcher.

member.name: T:NickERP.Platform.Core.PlatformContractVersion
member.summary:
The current version of the NICKSCAN ERP Platform Contract that this shared library publishes. Modules echo this value in their manifest (ModuleManifest.PlatformContractVersion) so the portal can detect mismatches.
Bump the major version when a breaking change to PLATFORM.md ships. Bump the minor version for additive changes.

member.name: T:NickERP.Platform.Core.Tenancy.IAuditedEntity
member.summary: Marker interface for entities whose insert/update/delete events should be captured by the central audit log (Phase 4 onward). The platform's AuditingDbContextInterceptor automatically emits an audit event for any entity implementing this interface.

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Tenancy.IAuditedEntity.CreatedBy
member.summary: Username of the user who created this row.

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Tenancy.IAuditedEntity.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when this row was created.

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Tenancy.IAuditedEntity.UpdatedBy
member.summary: Username of the user who last updated this row.

member.name: P:NickERP.Platform.Core.Tenancy.IAuditedEntity.UpdatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of the last update (null if never updated).

member.name: T:NickERP.Platform.Core.Tenancy.ITenantOwned
member.summary:
Marker interface for entities that belong to a specific tenant. Every business-data entity in every module SHOULD implement this from Phase 1 onward.
The platform's TenantOwnedEntityInterceptor automatically writes the current tenant id on insert, and EF Core global query filters automatically scope reads. Modules don't have to do anything except implement the interface and call builder.AddTenantQueryFilter<T>() in OnModelCreating.
